evidence.snippet: ePropelled designs top-performing propulsion motors, controllers, and hybrid power solutions for uncrewed ground vehicles (UGVs).

items.notes: Brushless motors for UAVs (Sparrow Series) and propulsion motors for UGVs (Rhino Series) are the core product lines.

evidence.snippet:
Sparrow Series AMC 6S20A ESC Drone Motor Controller
===================================================
$179.00

items.notes: Sparrow Series AMC ESC/motor controllers (AMC 6S20A, 6S40A, 6S20AW) sold as standalone drone motor controllers.

evidence.snippet: ePropelled’s Atlas hybrid power generation and management systems ensure reliable, efficient performance in demanding ground environments. USA-designed, they enable extended range, lower operational costs, and quiet operation while supporting full vehicle autonomy and mission agility. With onboard electric generation, power conversion, and ePConnect™ diagnostics, Atlas enhances endurance and overall drivetrain performance for land-based UGV applications.

[ePropelled Announces 2026 Expansion of Hercules™ Starter Generator Line, Introducing Advanced Customization and Scalable Hybrid Power Solutions](/blogs/press-releases/epropelled-announces-2026-expansion-of-hercules%E2%84%A2-starter-generator-line-introducing-advanced-customization-and-scalable-hybrid-power-solutions)

items.notes: Atlas Series hybrid power generation/management for UGVs; Hercules Series starter generators for hybrid UAV power.

items.name: Falcon Series
items.notes: Listed on homepage as a UAV product collection; no dedicated product page fetched.

evidence.snippet: As we continue shaping the future of American-made UAS, collaboration and innovation remain at the heart of our success. We must build scalable, NDAA-compliant, and sustainable solutions that strengthen our industrial base, ensuring that U.S. technology remains competitive on a global scale.

ndaa.notes: CEO blog advocates for building NDAA-compliant systems and cites American-made UAS, but no explicit Section 848/889 compliance claim for ePropelled products is made.

evidence.snippet: At ePropelled, we view Blue UAS not just as a compliance framework—but as a blueprint for credible innovation. As a propulsion technology provider to several UAS platforms, and additionally program-compliant manufacturers supplying to the USA, we are actively aligning our systems with Blue UAS requirements and pursuing certification through the Blue UAS Framework.

blue_uas.notes: Site explicitly states ePropelled is 'actively aligning our systems with Blue UAS requirements and pursuing certification through the Blue UAS Framework' — pursuing, not yet achieved.

tagline: Brushless motors, ESCs, and starter-generators for UAVs, UGVs, and USVs across Sparrow, Rhino, Atlas, Hercules, and Falcon series. Laconia, New Hampshire–based component supplier in production. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of defense integration is sparse.
